authors: Angela Misri Nicole Blanchett April Lindgren School of Journalism
raw_title: “There’s a Rule Book in my Head”: Journalism Ethics Meet A.I. in the Newsroom
title_en: “There’s a Rule Book in my Head”: Journalism Ethics Meet A.I. in the Newsroom
title_zh: “我脑海中有本规则手册”：新闻伦理与人工智能在新闻编辑室的相遇
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了新闻工作者如何将传统的新闻伦理规则应用于人工智能在新闻编辑室中的使用。研究发现，记者们通常依靠内心的道德准则来应对AI带来的新挑战，比如自动化新闻生成和算法推荐系统。
plain_summary_en: This article examines how journalists apply traditional ethical rules to the use of artificial intelligence in newsrooms. The research finds that reporters typically rely on internal moral guidelines to address new challenges posed by AI, such as automated news generation and algorithmic recommendation systems.
research_direction_zh: 研究数字时代新闻伦理与人工智能技术的交叉点，探索新闻工作者如何在技术变革中维护职业标准和公众信任。
research_direction_en: Investigating the intersection of journalism ethics and artificial intelligence technology in the digital age, exploring how journalists maintain professional standards and public trust amidst technological changes.
